## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance steady (\~400 sessions/week); real estate, finance top performers](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Shifting strategy: deeper, product-oriented content showcasing Datagrid capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Need to align thought leadership posts with Thiago's activities and company calendar](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Planning to scale content strategy, potentially exploring publication angle](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Update

### Performance Review
